section.div: Cross-platform GUI written in Rust using ADB to debloat non-rooted Android devices. Improve your privacy, the security and battery life of your device.
💸 An app created to help users manage a budget and purchases
💫 Toolkit to help you get started with Spec-Driven Development
Record meetings and dictation on your Mac. Everything becomes plain Markdown files that Claude, Codex, or any AI can search. Free, open source, 100% local transcription.
